prompt: Напиши CLI-утилиту, которая рекурсивно объединяет base.json и override.json и сохраняет merged.json.
expected_steps: clarify merge precedence and allowed JSON top-level type
create small CLI project scaffold with package module, README and tests
define contract for base override and merged output
add fixture-based tests for merge and CLI behavior
run project-scoped tests and produce usage example
acceptance_criteria: base and override JSON fixtures are merged recursively
invalid top-level JSON type is rejected
all tests run from generated project root
